title: How might I go about showing the Number of Boards in a Dashboard is pulling from?
excerpt: So, I’m trying to create a Dashboard that pulls from several boards. I’m using the Numbers widget, but it will only aggregate data from the items in the board itself. I really only want to count the number of boards that…

posts.author: jaguda-ingenium (Dr. Jay Aguda)
posts.cookedHtml: So, I’m trying to create a Dashboard that pulls from several boards. I’m using the Numbers widget, but it will only aggregate data from the items in the board itself. I really only want to count the number of boards that this dashboard is pulling from. How might I accomplish this?

posts.author: jailynnlucidday (Jai-Lynn Hoops)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @jaguda-ingenium !

The numbers widget functionality is for aggregating data, but there is a number indicator in the top left corner of a dashboard that does count the number of boards that are connected.

As of June 2022, I do not see a widget that can support your use case though.

Hope that helps!
